flowContents.comments: This flow retrieves account details from Salesforce, calculates the industry per count based on the Industry field, splits the records into individual objects, and then loads the processed data into Snowflake.
flowContents.name: Salesforce_to_Snowflake

parameters.name: AggregationQuery
parameters.value:
SELECT* , COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY Industry) AS IndustryCount
FROM FLOWFILE

parameters.name: SalesforceQuery
parameters.value:
SELECT Id, Name, Phone, Website, Industry
FROM Account
WHERE Owner.Username = 'divija.garg613@agentforce.com'
  AND DAY_ONLY(CreatedDate) = 2025-10-01
